chunks.text: And you have to tell me

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Don't use grid

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Use flexbox only

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: It's very straight forward

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: But again if you don't get these icons

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Then that should also be totally fine
